name: Buttercream Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon clear vanilla for white, brown for chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl with a small amount of hot tap water to start.
2. Gradually add more hot tap water until the desired spreading consistency is reached.
3. Beat until creamy.
CHOCOLATE: Add 3 or 4 envelopes of premelted chocolate or 3-4 oz of melted unsweetened chocolate before adding too much hot water to frosting.
Frosts two 8 or 9 inch layers or a 13x9 inch cake with leftover to spare.
